name: Varad Kodgire
title: applied ai developer · llm systems · agent builder
heading: I build AI that actually ships.
subheading: LLM pipelines, agent systems, and workflow automation — designed to run in production, not just notebooks.
bio: Applied AI Developer with hands-on experience building LLM-powered applications, RAG pipelines, and workflow-driven AI systems. Skilled in designing tool-calling agents, integrating APIs, and automating processes using tools like n8n.
Experienced in optimizing latency and API usage while developing scalable AI features across NLP and generative AI use cases, with practical deployment using Python, Hugging Face, and Docker.
Currently building OpenClaw agent skills at MyVyay — enabling automated IDE operations, GitHub workflows, and memory-aware context handling.
about: Open to full-time roles as an AI Developer, LLM Engineer, or Applied AI Researcher. I move fast, ship working systems, and care deeply about the gap between a cool demo and a reliable product.
My approach: understand the problem first, build the simplest thing that works, then optimize. Every project here was built and deployed — not just prototyped.
